runtimes.reason: Cut suggested clip ranges, extract WAV audio for transcription, scale/crop to 1080x1920 vertical, and burn captions into exported clips via window.tinyAtom.media.runFfmpeg.
Read duration, resolution, and stream info of imported videos via window.tinyAtom.media.runFfprobe.
Local timestamped transcription of extracted audio via window.tinyAtom.speech.transcribe with format json.
Model weights required by whisper-cli for window.tinyAtom.speech.transcribe.
